subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 12
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be Thou, O God, for this fiery strand, this lordly cord! At one time I behold it as fire, for by it the hearts of the devoted are consumed
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الله من هذا لخیط الناری و هذا لحبل الربانی مره اشاهد انه نار لان بها
subcodes.subjects: @love as fire, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @fire and light; fire and water, @The Holy Spirit
